space_complexity: O(n), not sure if this is auxiliary

time_complexity: O(e^{\sqrt{(1+o(1))n \log n}}), under assumption about numbers in a sequence behaving randomly in a given range

algorithm_name: The Trajkovic and Hedley corner detector 1998
Lindeberg's watershed-based grey-level blob detection algorithm 1991
He X. D. Torrance K. E. Sillion 1991
Westin S. H. Arvo J. R. and Torrance K. E 1992
R. Nock and F. Nielsen Statistical Region Merging
S.L. Horowitz and T. Pavlidis - directed split and merge
Geman and Geman Markov random fields

time_complexity: O(\exp((1+o(1))(32n/9)^{1/3}(log n)^{2/3}), under assumption about numbers in a sequence behaving randomly in a given range

algorithm_name: V. A. Lyul’ka and A. V. Romanenko
V. A. Lyul’ka and I. E. Mikhailov
P. Costantini, B. I. Kvasov, and C. Manni
KARNI Z. GOTSMAN C. GORTLER S. J. 2005
